serviceNotes.engine oil: S54 M engine: shorter oil intervals than standard E46 (often 15,000 km / 12 months EU); track use ~8,000 km. Sources: BMW M E46 maintenance supplement.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; more often on track cars.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Six plugs; high-performance interval ~45,000–60,000 km—confirm M table.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Performance brakes: inspect at least every 15,000 km.
serviceNotes.SMG gearbox fluid: E46 M3 with SMG-II: hydraulic fluid and actuator service at ~60,000 km for shift quality.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: E46 M3 6-speed manual: gear oil replacement at ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High-rev engine: ~100,000 km preventive coolant service.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: S54 uses solid lifters; BMW specifies valve clearance checks—verify interval for your model (CSL vs standard).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 (S54) maintenance supplement — Oil Service 15,000 km / 12 months EU; REC 8,000 km track use
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — microfilter 30,000 km per M maintenance schedule
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — engine air filter 60,000 km per M supplement (four 15,000 km oil intervals)
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 (S54) — spark plugs 45,000 km per M maintenance table
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km minimum
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km minimum
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — M vehicle check 30,000 km
serviceSources.SMG gearbox fluid: BMW TIS E46 M3 SMG-II — hydraulic fluid service 60,000 km; REC shift-quality interval
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW TIS E46 M3 — manual transmission oil 60,000 km service
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW TIS E46 M3 — M limited-slip rear differential fluid 60,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — coolant per M schedule; REC 100,000 km preventive for S54
serviceSources.valve adjustment: BMW TIS S54 — valve clearance inspection per M maintenance table (~50,000 km)
